benchmark_user_1.summary: Linh introduces herself and shares her two-month journey learning Python.
benchmark_user_1.outcome: Discussion on Python concepts and further learning interests.

benchmark_user_1.summary: User asks about list comprehension and lambda functions in Python. The assistant explains both concepts with examples.
benchmark_user_1.outcome: User gains understanding of list comprehension and lambda functions.

benchmark_user_2.topic: Dị ứng sữa bò và thực đơn buổi sáng
benchmark_user_2.summary: Người dùng chia sẻ dị ứng sữa bò và nhận được thực đơn buổi sáng không chứa sữa bò.
benchmark_user_2.outcome: Người dùng có thực đơn phù hợp và an toàn cho dị ứng của mình.

benchmark_user_2.summary: User clarifies soy allergy; suggestions for a dairy and soy-free breakfast menu provided.
benchmark_user_2.outcome: User appreciates the adjustments and expresses willingness to ask for more help.

benchmark_user_3.summary: User encounters 'OperationalError' when connecting Django to PostgreSQL via Docker Compose.
benchmark_user_3.outcome: Provided troubleshooting steps to resolve the connection issue.

benchmark_user_3.summary: User resolved an issue by using service names instead of localhost in Docker Compose.
benchmark_user_3.outcome: User thanked assistant for the help and expressed willingness to ask further questions.

benchmark_user_4.summary: User wants to learn advanced Python concepts, focusing on decorators, generators, and OOP enhancements.
benchmark_user_4.outcome: User is encouraged to explore various advanced topics and request specific examples.

benchmark_user_5.summary: User is a backend developer exploring microservices with Python and FastAPI.
benchmark_user_5.outcome: User received guidance on building and deploying microservices.

benchmark_user_5.summary: API Gateway là điểm truy cập cho microservices, trong khi load balancing phân phối tải giữa các server để cải thiện hiệu suất.
benchmark_user_5.outcome: Người dùng hiểu rõ hơn về vai trò và chức năng của API Gateway và load balancing.

benchmark_user_6.summary: Nam introduces himself as a 25-year-old data scientist from Hanoi.
benchmark_user_6.outcome: User invited to discuss technologies and projects in data science.

benchmark_user_6.summary: User inquires about machine learning; assistant explains its types: supervised, unsupervised, and reinforcement learning.
benchmark_user_6.outcome: User gains understanding of machine learning concepts.

benchmark_user_7.topic: Phân tích sentiment với model BERT
benchmark_user_7.summary: Người dùng xây dựng model phân tích sentiment, đạt accuracy 87% trên test set.
benchmark_user_7.outcome: Đưa ra gợi ý cải thiện mô hình và khai thác kết quả.

benchmark_user_7.summary: User successfully deployed BERT on AWS Lambda; system is running smoothly.
benchmark_user_7.outcome: User received optimization suggestions for monitoring, cost management, and feature expansion.

benchmark_user_8.summary: User is learning DevOps and uses Docker Compose for multi-container applications.
benchmark_user_8.outcome: User received support and encouragement for using Docker Compose effectively.

benchmark_user_9.summary: List là mutable, tuple là immutable. List dùng [] và tuple dùng (). Tuple nhanh hơn và tiết kiệm bộ nhớ.
benchmark_user_9.outcome: Người dùng hiểu rõ sự khác biệt giữa list và tuple trong Python.

benchmark_user_9.topic: Dictionary Comprehension and Exception Handling in Python
benchmark_user_9.summary: User inquired about dictionary comprehension and best practices for exception handling in Python.
benchmark_user_9.outcome: Provided detailed explanations and examples for both topics.

benchmark_user_10.summary: Hoa works at a fintech startup and recently completed a course on LangChain and LLM applications.
benchmark_user_10.outcome: Discussion on the relevance and insights gained from the course.

benchmark_user_10.summary: User built a customer support chatbot using RAG pattern, achieving a 30% increase in resolution rate.
benchmark_user_10.outcome: User plans to enhance features and expand the chatbot further.
